input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

final_answer: Every Accumulator Container must contain minimum one fuse (EV.6.6) and two or more Accumulator Isolation Relays (AIR)
